text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "At about 7:00 p.m., experienced oppressive retrosternal pain that began while at rest, resolved spontaneously after about 30 minutes.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "No dyspnea or other significant symptoms.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "To the patient, the characteristics of the pain seem different from those of previous acute cardiac events.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Currently completely asymptomatic, feeling well.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Therapy: trazodone 75mg 1 tablet in the evening, furosemide 25mg 1 tablet at 8 o'clock, metformin 1000mg 1 tablet at breakfast and 1 tablet at dinner, Forxiga 10mg at noon, Luvion 50mg 1 tablet at 4 p.m., Ranexa 500mg 1 tablet x 2/day, sertraline 50mg 1 tablet at 8 a.m., pantoprazole 20mg 1 tablet at 8 a.m., ASA 100mg, Trusopt 1 drop per eye x 2/day, Imolast 1 drop per eye in the evening, metoprolol 100mg 1/2 tablet x 2/day, Cholecomb 20/10mg 1 tablet in the evening.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Past Medical History: - in 2000 Subarachnoid hemorrhage; negative cerebral angiography for vascular malformations, follow up - hemorrhoidectomy followed by new ligation for rectorrhagia and recurrence (2012) - COVID infection without hospitalization April 20201, subsequently vaccinated with 2 doses of COVID vaccine - 2004 maximal stress test negative for angina and myocardial ischemia, examination followed for chest pain - 2007 anterior STEMI treated with primary PTCA + BMS on IVP, PTCA + DES on CT/IVA, IVA II and OM; EF preserved - May 2008 submaximal stress test positive for myocardial ischemia, coronary angiography with evidence of paraostial restenosis on CT, critical LCX stenosis and ostial PDA treated with PTCA BMS on PDA.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "Staged PTCA + DES on CT and LCX.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "- since then, residual angina from moderate exertion CCS II - December 2011 coronary angiography for chest pain at rest: restenosis of LCX I treated with PTCA + DES, POBA LCX III.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "Echocardiogram: normal left ventricle, minimal MR, sequelae of pericarditis.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "- 6/2012 PES doubtful for ischemia - 11/2012 SPECT + dipyridamole.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "Positive test for angina and ECG ischemia.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Myocardial scintigraphy positive for inducible ischemia in the lateral and inferior regions.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "EF at rest 70%, after stress 66% - July 2013 elective coronary angiography: good outcome from previous PCI, chronic occlusion of slender diagonal branch.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "- echocardiogram March 2017: left ventricle EF and kinesis normal.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "- episodes of chest pain on exertion.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_15] ("2026-01-01", "Last visit 3/2017: Ranolazine prescribed - 4/2019 Inferolateral STEMI complicated by primary VF.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_16] ("2026-01-01", "Urgent coronary angiography: critical in-stent restenosis on LCX I, very late ostial LAD thrombosis, diffuse restenosis of right PDA.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_17] ("2026-01-01", "Emergency thrombus aspiration ineffective on LAD, followed by kissing balloon on CT-LAD-LCX.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_18] ("2026-01-01", "Due to evidence of upstream thrombus migration on CT, thrombus aspiration performed again, followed by multiple dilatations on CT-LAD and CT-LCX + final kissing balloon.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_19] ("2026-01-01", "Good result at the end.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_20] ("2026-01-01", "HS trop T 5mg/ml, non-Q wave ECG evolution.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_21] ("2026-01-01", "skin rash, possibly indicative of an allergic reaction to the contrast agent.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_22] ("2026-01-01", "Pre-discharge coronary angiography check-up with good results from previous stenting and recent POBA on CT-LAD, residual focal gas hypoexpansion from previous stenting on proximal LCX, treated with focal dilatations with good angiographic and IVUS results.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_23] ("2026-01-01", "LVEF 55% - 6/2022 elective hospitalization for resumption of chest pain; coronary angiography: right PL 80%, good result from PTCA on LAD.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_24] ("2026-01-01", "Ostial LCX restenosis 80% treated with DEB and kissing balloon CT-LAD.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_25] ("2026-01-01", "Feeling well since discharge.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_26] ("2026-01-01", "- Last Cardiological check-up May 2023 RELATIVE PHONE_NUMBER RELATIVE PHONE_NUMBER", 0.0, 0.5)
